assistant_greeting: Hello! I am the P@SHA assistant. P@SHA (Pakistan Software Houses Association) is Pakistan's national IT industry trade association. I can answer questions about P@SHA, its membership, how to join or sign up, member benefits, events, careers, and how to contact P@SHA. Ask me anything about the community, the application, or the directory.
how_to_sign_up: How to sign up / join P@SHA as a member: Step 1 - Fill the membership form at https://www.pasha.org.pk/membership-form/. Step 2 - Pay the membership fee. Step 3 - Submit proof of filing taxes. To be eligible you must be a business engaged in software development, IT or IT-enabled services, with IT/ITeS as your primary business (over 60% of revenue) and a registered place of business in Pakistan. Membership is processed in about 10-14 working days, or 2 working days for an urgent application with an additional fee of PKR 5,000.
membership_cost: P@SHA membership fees: Associate Member (annual turnover under PKR 50 Million) - one-time registration fee PKR 5,000 plus annual fee PKR 20,000. Corporate Member (annual turnover PKR 50 Million or above) - one-time registration fee PKR 5,000 plus annual fee PKR 50,000.
what_is_pasha: P@SHA is the Pakistan Software Houses Association for IT and IT Enabled Services, founded in 1992. It is the only national IT trade association in Pakistan with over 1600 members. It acts as the voice of the IT industry, advocating on policy, running events and salary surveys, and promoting Pakistan's IT industry internationally.
how_to_contact: You can contact P@SHA through its official website https://www.pasha.org.pk and the contact page. For general inquiries and membership questions, use the contact and membership forms on the website.
organization: Pakistan Software Houses Association for IT and ITeS (P@SHA)

introduction.full_name: Pakistan Software Houses Association for IT and IT Enabled Services
introduction.description: P@SHA was formed in 1992 by a number of software and IT companies to create a functional trade association for the IT industry of Pakistan. The primary aim of the association was to form a strong cluster of IT and IT enabled companies that can lobby with the government to develop policies and initiatives that will encourage the development of the IT industry and attract more member companies to join the industry.
introduction.current_status: Over 1600+ members strong, remains the only National IT Association in Pakistan.
introduction.role: P@SHA acts as the voice of the IT industry. It provides input on policies, legislation and incentives, sponsors career events and salary surveys, and promotes Pakistan's IT industry internationally through trade and technical delegations.
introduction.recognition: P@SHA has gained international recognition by having won several awards in the Asia Pacific ICT awards.
introduction.legal_structure: Company Limited by Guarantee under the Companies Act, 2007

chairman_message.title: Chairman, P@SHA
chairman_message.message_summary: P@SHA serves as a vital hub for innovation, collaboration, and advocacy in Pakistan's burgeoning technology sector. The association engages with key government stakeholders including Ministry of Finance, Commerce, FBR, SIFC, Foreign Affairs, PTA, HEC, Planning, Youth, NAVTTC, PSEB, and MOITT. The goal is to position P@SHA as a global thought leader in the tech space and implement a comprehensive brand management framework.

membership_benefits.tagline: Join Pakistan's Sole Authorized & Globally Recognized IT Industry Trade Association

benefits.title: Protect Your Rights
benefits.description: P@SHA advocates on behalf of its members with government and regulatory bodies. As the sole authorized representative of the IT industry, it acts as the voice of the industry. Members can avail direct access and input into policy decisions that shape how IT business is conducted within Pakistan.

benefits.title: Lead with Confidence
benefits.description: P@SHA members have access to a digital data backbone of premium research and analysis on the latest trends and developments in the IT industry.

benefits.title: Find Your Tribe
benefits.description: P@SHA provides networking opportunities to its members to interact with fellow businesses, potential partners, IT professionals, and government officials. Members can participate in exclusive events, conferences, and seminars.

benefits.title: Train Your Team, For Less
benefits.description: Access to industry-standard and world-class training and development programs, including certification programs, workshops, and mentorship opportunities – at special discounted rates, exclusively for members only.

benefits.title: Go Beyond Borders
benefits.description: P@SHA members receive firsthand invitations to become part of official delegations taking Pakistani tech beyond borders. From direct liaisons with various embassies to exclusive opportunities to meet visiting foreign stakeholders.

benefits.title: Be Recognized for Excellence
benefits.description: P@SHA members can highlight their achievements through the P@SHA website, newsletters, and social media platforms including various awards and recognition opportunities.

questions_and_answers.question: How Long Is The Membership For?
questions_and_answers.answer: A P@SHA membership is granted for one (01) year and expires on March 31st of each year, irrespective of the date the membership was originally granted.

questions_and_answers.question: Can A Company Have More Than One Membership?
questions_and_answers.answer: One membership represents one company. No individual firm or company is allowed to hold more than one membership.

questions_and_answers.question: Can A Membership Be Transferred?
questions_and_answers.answer: No, membership cannot be transferred to anyone else. However, if the member undergoes a change in legal status (e.g., merger, acquisition), the case may be reviewed by the secretariat.

questions_and_answers.question: What Is The Difference In Benefits For Corporate & Associate Members?
questions_and_answers.answer: None! The two categories exist to allow representation from both small as well as large companies. All members enjoy the same benefits regardless of category.

questions_and_answers.question: Where Can I Learn More About P@SHA Membership Rules?
questions_and_answers.answer: You can learn more about the rules governing P@SHA memberships in Articles 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6 of P@SHA's Articles of Association at https://www.pasha.org.pk/association-details/

questions_and_answers.question: Who Can Become A P@SHA Member?
questions_and_answers.answer: To become a P@SHA member you must be: (1) a business concern engaged in software development, information technology services and IT-enabled services, and/or (2) a company that has IT or ITeS as their primary business with IT revenue of more than 60%, with a registered place of business in Pakistan.

questions_and_answers.question: What is the processing time for membership?
questions_and_answers.answer: Regular Processing takes 10–14 working days. Urgent Processing takes 02 working days, subject to an additional fee of PKR 5,000.

questions_and_answers.question: What are the membership fees?
questions_and_answers.answer: For both types, the one-time Registration Fee is PKR 5,000. The Annual Fee is PKR 20,000 for Associate Members (turnover < PKR 50 million) and PKR 50,000 for Corporate Members (turnover ≥ PKR 50 million).

general_inquiry.description: For general inquiries, P@SHA can be reached via the contact form on the official website or directly via email and phone.

eligibility_to_vote: The member has completed two years of valid membership of P@SHA.
The member has fulfilled the conditions of membership and renewal.
The member has submitted the filled specimen card.

The proprietor, partner or director (or a representative not below the rank of General Manager) is eligible to vote if their name is registered with the Secretary-General and appears on the voters list.
